BackstoryDef.title: Lustful Deviant
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is conscious and intellectually lucid, yet [PAWN_possessive] mind is gripped by an absolute, unyielding primal desire. While [PAWN_pronoun] can apparently converse normally, all interest in traditional work has completely evaporated due to their obsessive lust.

BackstoryDef.title: Carnal alpha
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is conscious and intellectually lucid, maintaining absolute control over the horde through brutal carnal dominance. While [PAWN_possessive] mind is just as twisted by primal lust, [PAWN_pronoun] channels it into leadership, maintaining the coordination needed to direct siege weapons and force obedience from subordinates.

BackstoryDef.title: Feral Deviant
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the untamed wilderness. Having never learned the constraints of societal laws, ethical frameworks, or basic morality, [PAWN_pronoun] grew up entirely guided by instinct and the immediate satisfaction of primal urges.
